title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Oil India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Oil India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Oil India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Oil India:
Oil India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oil India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
